items.name: cinematic-cut
items.description: Cinematic hard-cut transition for Remotion with literary or snappy easing and a one-frame accent burst.

items.name: color-shift
items.description: Remotion-primitive-based background-color interpolation transition. Uses interpolateColors for perceptually smooth transitions between any two BRAND.md OKLCH-anchored color tokens. Literary or snappy easing. Uses AbsoluteFill + useCurrentFrame + interpolate + interpolateColors.

items.name: fade-blur
items.description: Remotion-primitive-based fade + blur transition. Opacity 0→1 with blur blurMax→0 (or reverse for fade-out). Literary or snappy easing from BRAND.md motion vocabulary. Uses AbsoluteFill + useCurrentFrame + interpolate.

items.name: slide-reveal
items.description: Remotion-primitive-based slide transition. Translates child from off-screen at distance×100% to 0 along chosen axis (left/right/up/down). Combined with opacity fade per BRAND.md. Uses AbsoluteFill + useCurrentFrame + interpolate.

items.name: zoom-pulse
items.description: Remotion-primitive-based scale pulse transition. Smooth scale interpolation from scaleFrom to scaleTo with a natural overshoot at 60% of the pulse duration. Literary or snappy easing from BRAND.md. Uses AbsoluteFill + useCurrentFrame + interpolate.
